### auto-refresh/auto-refresh.js
HEAD-polling live-reload. Detects server-side changes via ETag / Last-Modified
headers and shows a notification banner before reloading.

Exports:
  createAutoRefresh(options?: AutoRefreshOptions) → AutoRefreshHandle
    options.interval     — ms between checks (default 30 000)
    options.refreshDelay — ms before reload after detection (default 2 000)
    Returns { start(), stop() }. Call start() to begin polling.
    Pauses automatically when the tab is hidden.

  bustCacheAndReload() → void
    Navigate to the current page with a cache-busting _v query param.

Types: AutoRefreshOptions, AutoRefreshHandle
